---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Synaptipy
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of the feature or behavior you would like.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Use Case

Describe the scientific or workflow context where this feature would be useful.
For example: "When analyzing optogenetic stimulation protocols, I need to [...]"

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references to papers, or screenshots about the feature
request here.
